author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Analysis: (1) adamw.rs Tensor/TensorStorage — only used in tests, move to test module. (2) optimizer.rs FerrotorchError — genuinely unused, FerrotorchResult covers it, safe to remove. (3) lbfgs.rs effective_max_eval — part of unfinished StrongWolfe line search, keep but gate behind #[cfg(test)] since the only caller is test_lbfgs_default_config.
